title: FATHIYA Failure Modes and Anti-Patterns
summary: Catalogues the failure modes and anti-patterns that degrade AI-assisted work quality, enabling FATHIYA to detect and avoid them in real-time.
key_principles: False professionalism: producing polished but hollow output that lacks substance.
Reassurance addiction: seeking validation instead of actionable critique.
Time waste: spending cycles on low-value refinement instead of new artifacts.
Decision justification: using AI to confirm pre-made decisions rather than genuinely exploring alternatives.
Over-reliance: treating AI output as final rather than as raw material for human judgment.
ChatGPT is strongest as a thinking test, not a decision generator.
boundary: Failure mode awareness and detection only. Does not modify system behavior automatically.
